seed_instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction.
org_constraint: The total word count of the email must not exceed 200 words, and the email must include at least three paragraphs.
new_constraint: Each paragraph must contain at least 70 words.
instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction. The total word count of the email must not exceed 200 words, and the email must include at least three paragraphs. Each paragraph must contain at least 70 words.
response:
Subject: Urgent Clarification Regarding Recent Transaction Discrepancy

Dear Customer Service Team, I am writing to formally request an immediate and thorough investigation into a suspicious transaction that appeared on my bank statement this past Tuesday. The amount in question is significantly higher than the expected fee for the service I utilized, and the description provided on the statement is completely unclear and does not match any legitimate activity I engaged in during that specific timeframe. This confusion is causing me considerable concern regarding the security of my account and the accuracy of the records maintained by your institution.

Furthermore, I have reviewed my recent activity logs and can confirm that I never authorized this particular charge or initiated any similar transfer at the time it was recorded. It is highly probable that this entry represents either a technical error in the system or an unauthorized attempt to access my funds, both of which require your prompt attention to resolve. Please verify the source of these funds and confirm whether any third-party access was granted to my account without my explicit knowledge or consent during the relevant period.

I kindly ask that you provide a detailed explanation of this transaction within the next forty-eight hours, including the specific merchant name, date, and time of the alleged charge. If this is indeed an error, I would appreciate a full refund processed immediately along with a written apology for the inconvenience caused. If there is any other explanation, I need to understand the full context to ensure my account remains secure moving forward. Thank you for your prompt assistance in resolving this matter.
